mapper.update: UPDATE curriculum_nodes SET is_active = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND is_active = 1
UPDATE lessons l JOIN curriculum_nodes cn ON cn.node_id = l.node_id SET l.is_active = 0, l.updated_at = NOW() WHERE cn.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND l.is_active = 1
UPDATE practice_problems SET is_active = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND is_active = 1
UPDATE exam_sessions SET status = 'FAILED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND status IN ('CREATED', 'READY')

UPDATE curriculum_nodes cn INNER JOIN subject_content_status_backups backup ON backup.content_id = cn.node_id AND backup.content_type = 'CURRICULUM' AND backup.subject_id = #{subjectId} SET cn.is_active = backup.was_active, cn.updated_at = NOW() WHERE cn.subject_id = #{subjectId}

UPDATE lessons l INNER JOIN subject_content_status_backups backup ON backup.content_id = l.lesson_id AND backup.content_type = 'LESSON' AND backup.subject_id = #{subjectId} SET l.is_active = backup.was_active, l.updated_at = NOW()

UPDATE practice_problems pp INNER JOIN subject_content_status_backups backup ON backup.content_id = pp.problem_id AND backup.content_type = 'PROBLEM' AND backup.subject_id = #{subjectId} SET pp.is_active = backup.was_active, pp.updated_at = NOW() WHERE pp.subject_id = #{subjectId}
